justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted "next Tuesday" as June 2nd and "earlier than June 1st" as May 26th, demonstrating good temporal understanding.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent offered reasonable alternatives when the initial request was unavailable, providing options for different days and times.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently gathered information and made relevant API calls without unnecessary turns or redundant questions.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was mostly smooth and professional, with the agent effectively guiding the user to a successful booking.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent recovered well from the initial unavailability, maintaining context and offering relevant alternative dates and times.
